gt_sql: SELECT T2.Location FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Eliciting priors from experts'
pred_sql:
SELECT TRIM(u.Location) AS Location
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE TRIM(p.Title) = 'Eliciting priors from experts';
question: What is the location of the owner of the post "Eliciting priors from experts"?
